items.name: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

items.name: How Moda Builds Production-Grade AI Design Agents with Deep Agents
items.summary: Moda uses a multi-agent system built on Deep Agents and traced through LangSmith to let non-designers create and iterate on professional-grade visuals.

items.name: Two different types of agent authorization
items.summary: LangSmith Fleet introduces two types of agent authorization: Assistants, which use the end user's own credentials, and Claws, which use a fixed set of credentials.
